title: Commit schema validation check in db/data submodule
description: import_osm.py changes are stashed in backend/db/data (git stash: 'schema validation pre-import check'). Adds EXPECTED_MIGRATION_ID constant and validate_schema() pre-import check. Pop stash, test, and commit in the submodule repo.

title: DefaultAddress table + migration
description: Add default_address table to DB. Columns: id, city_id (FK→city), label, street_address, road_name, lat, lng. Add EF entity, DbContext, and migration. No seeding needed in migration — addresses will be added manually via POST endpoint.

title: POST default address endpoint (API key auth + bounds check)
description: Add POST /api/cities/{cityId}/default-addresses endpoint. Validates that the address lat/lng falls within the city's bounding box. Secured with API key: checks X-Api-Key header against AdminApiKey config value. Accessible in dev (appsettings.Development.json) and on live server via env var.

title: City endpoint by ID + include default addresses
description: Change GET /api/cities/{cityName} to GET /api/cities/{cityId} (long). Update CityDetailDto to include DefaultAddress[] (id, label, streetAddress, roadName, lat, lng). Update frontend cityApi.ts accordingly.

title: Add city bounds to DB and expose /api/cities endpoint
description: Add BoundsNorth/South/East/West columns to City entity. EFC migration. Add GET /api/cities/{cityName} endpoint returning CityDto with bounds. Needed for frontend bounds validation in address input (frontend-4om).

title: Add rickroll counter endpoint (backend)
description: Create api/increment_rickroll_counter endpoint. Increment rickroll_counter row in Values table (columns: name, label, num_value, string_value, id). Return num_value after incrementing.
